case_title: NICHOLSON, WAYNE VS RAND MCNALLY & CO. C/O CT CORP. SYSTEM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY NICHOLSON, WAYNE AS TO DEFENDANT RAND MCNALLY & CO.   C/O CT CORP. SYSTEM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NICHOLSON, WAYNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAND MCNALLY & CO.   C/O CT CORP. SYSTEM NO EXPLICIT MISREPRESENTATION IN THE AUTHOR'S BOOK THAT THE TOURIST SECTION OF WARSAW, POLAND WOULD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO AUTHORIZED AGENT FOR RAND MCNALLY RETURNED SIGNED

parties.name: NICHOLSON, WAYNE 105 HOFFMAN AVE. SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114
